mapper.sql: FROM `order` o LEFT JOIN deal d ON d.id = o.deal_id JOIN shop s ON s.id = o.shop_id JOIN merchant m ON m.id = s.merchant_id LEFT JOIN app_user u ON u.id = o.user_id LEFT JOIN payment p ON p.order_id = o.id AND p.id = (SELECT MAX(px.id) FROM payment px WHERE px.order_id = o.id) LEFT JOIN refund r ON r.order_id = o.id
mapper.select:
SELECT o.id, o.order_no, s.merchant_id, m.company_name AS merchant_name, o.shop_id, s.name AS shop_name, o.user_id, COALESCE(u.nickname, '') AS user_nickname, COALESCE(NULLIF(u.email, ''), NULLIF(u.phone, ''), '') AS account, o.deal_id, COALESCE(d.title, '') AS deal_title, o.quantity, o.unit_price, o.amount, o.currency, o.pay_method, o.pay_status, o.status, p.channel AS payment_channel, p.channel_txn AS payment_channel_txn, p.status AS payment_status, o.paid_at, o.created_at, p.created_at AS payment_created_at, r.id AS refund_id, r.amount AS refund_amount, r.reason AS refund_reason, r.status AS refund_status, r.audit_reason AS refund_audit_reason, r.audited_at AS refund_audited_at, r.created_at AS refund_created_at
ORDER BY o.created_at DESC, o.id DESC LIMIT #{query.pageSize} OFFSET #{query.offset}
